title: I used DeepSeek R1 to build an app that helps me during my trading sessions here are the results.
author: Kind_Shop_3846
selftext:
Day trading isn’t just staring at charts and clicking buy or sell ,it’s a grind. Price action flies, news drops, indicators flash, and it all hits at once. The hardest part for me has always been keeping my head straight.

I’ve had days where I’m juggling multiple charts and alerts and my brain just locks up. Other times I’ll spot the setup but hesitate for a split second and miss the entry. And of course, there are those losses where I feel the urge to win it back right away, which usually makes things worse. After a few hours of that, I’m mentally drained, like I’ve run a marathon sitting in front of my screen.

That’s exactly why I built this app,to cut through the noise, keep me focused, and take some of the pressure off. It helps me stay structured and stick to my plan, and I’m already seeing the difference in my trading sessions.
